description: Text that will be associated with each notification sent to the user when a deployment is not used for a long time and is sent to the recycle bin.

ca.footer: Si us plau, esborreu els desplegaments que ja no s'utilitzaran.

description: Password recovery message that will be sent when user requests password recovery

ca.body:
Hem rebut la vostra sol·licitud de restabliment de contrasenya per accedir a IsardVDI. Si us plau, cliqueu al següent botó per establir una nova contrasenya:

Estableix la contrasenya

Aquest botó només es pot utilitzar una vegada i té una validesa de 24 hores.

Si no heu iniciat aquesta sol·licitud, podeu ignorar aquest missatge.
ca.footer: Si us plau, no respongueu a aquest correu electrònic, ja que ha estat generat automàticament.
ca.title: Restableix la contrasenya IsardVDI

en.body:
We've received your password reset request to access IsardVDI. Click on the following button to set a new password:

Set password

This button can only be used once and it's valid for 24 hours.

If you did not initiate this request, you may safely ignore this message.
en.footer: Please do not answer since this email has been automatically generated.
en.title: Reset IsardVDI password

es.body:
Hemos recibido su solicitud de restablecimiento de contraseña para acceder a IsardVDI. Haga clic en el siguiente botón para establecer una nueva contraseña:

Configurar contraseña

Este botón solo se puede usar una vez y es válido durante 24 horas.

Si no inició esta solicitud, puede ignorar este mensaje.
es.footer: Por favor, no responda a este correo electrónico, ya que es un envío automático.
es.title: Restablecer contraseña de IsardVDI

name: Password recovery

system.body:
We've received your password reset request to access IsardVDI. Click on the following button to set a new password:

Set password

This button can only be used once and it's valid for 24 hours.

If you did not initiate this request, you may safely ignore this message.
system.footer: Please do not answer since this email has been automatically generated.
system.title: Reset IsardVDI password

description: Email verification that will be sent when user logs in for the first time and/or admin forces email verification at new logins

ca.body:
Si us plau, confirmeu la vostra adreça electrònica clicant al següent botó:

Verifica el correu electrònic

Aquest botó només es pot utilitzar una vegada i té una validesa de 1 hora.
ca.footer: Si us plau, no respongueu a aquest correu electrònic, ja que ha estat generat automàticament.
ca.title: Verifica el correu electrònic IsardVDI

en.body:
Please verify your email address by clicking on the following button:

Verify email

This button can only be used once and it's valid for 1 hour.
en.footer: Please do not answer since this email has been automatically generated.
en.title: Verify IsardVDI email

es.body:
Verifique su dirección de correo electrónico haciendo clic en el siguiente botón:

Verificar correo

Este botón solo se puede usar una vez y es válido durante 1 hora.
es.footer: Por favor, no responda a este correo electrónico, ya que es un envío automático.
es.title: Verificación del correo electrónico de IsardVDI

name: Email verification

system.body:
Please verify your email address by clicking on the following button:

Verify email

This button can only be used once and it's valid for 1 hour.
system.footer: Please do not answer since this email has been automatically generated.
system.title: Verify IsardVDI email

description: Notification about the modification of the user's elements with bookables when a GPU profile is deleted.

ca.body:
Alguns dels elements amb reserves han estat modificats

Hola usuari,

A causa de la eliminació d'un perfil de GPU per part d'un administrador, us informem que

Aquests elements ja no porten el perfil que tenien assignat:

Escriptoris:

{desktops}

Desplegaments:

{deployments}

I aquestes reserves han estat eliminades:

Reserves:

{bookings}
ca.footer: Si us plau, no respongueu a aquest correu electrònic, ja que ha estat generat automàticament.
ca.title: Alguns elements teus amb reserves han estat modificats

en.body:
Some of the elements with bookings you own have been modified

Hello user,

Due to the elimination of a GPU profile by an administrator, we inform you that

The profiles assigned to these items have been deleted and they no longer have assigned the profile they had before:

Desktops:

{desktops}

Deployments:

{deployments}

And these bookings have been deleted:

Bookings:

{bookings}
en.footer: Please do not answer since this email has been automatically generated.
en.title: Some of your elements with bookings have been modified

es.body:
Algunos de tus elementos con reservas han sido modificados

A causa de la eliminación de un perfil de GPU por parte de un administrador, le informamos que

Estos elementos ya no llevan el perfil que tenían asignado:

Escritorios:

{desktops}

Despliegues:

{deployments}

Y estas reservas han sido eliminadas:

Reservas:

{bookings}
es.footer: Por favor, no responda a este correo electrónico, ya que es un envío automático.
es.title: Se han modificado algunos de tus elementos con reservas

name: Deleted GPU profile

system.body:
Some of the elements with bookings you own have been modified

Hello user,

Due to the elimination of a GPU profile by an administrator, we inform you that

The profiles assigned to these items have been deleted and they no longer have assigned the profile they had before:

Desktops:

{desktops}

Deployments:

{deployments}

And these bookings have been deleted:

Bookings:

{bookings}
system.footer: Please do not answer since this email has been automatically generated.
system.title: Some of your elements with bookings have been modified
